sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2282" key="ai)e/tion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰέτιον</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">χάριν ἐκτείσω</foreign>, prov. of those who repay benefits quickly, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg9009.tlg001:1:78" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apostol.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.78</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
